items.title: OpenAI faces investigation from state attorneys general
items.summary: It's not clear which states are involved, but they're asking about everything from OpenAI's ad policies to its handling of health data.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: The Creepshow video game is coming out this summer
items.summary: The point-and-click adventure game based on the horror anthology series arrives in August.
